channel.title: Starter on Yutong Jin
channel.description: Recent content in Starter on Yutong Jin

item.title: HelloWorld
item.description:
Overview

This is the earliest public repo in my GitHub history. It is extremely small, but it marks the point where I started using GitHub as a place to keep even the simplest experiments.

What It Represents

  • first public repo setup
  • basic GitHub workflow practice
  • a baseline before the later course and app projects became more structured

Stack

  • repository scaffold

Repo

  • GitHub: yutongjin/HelloWorld
